objections: will we actually hit projected income with only 4 reviews?
is short-let really better than guaranteed long-let?
why would Stayful be better than Pass the Keys?
exact_language: they promised us £1,500 to £2,000 and we haven't got close
we're both teachers we need this to work
it's the inconsistency that worries me

meeting.key_insight: Betrayal-damaged EX-STL. PTK promised £1,500-2,000, delivered ~£1,000 peak. Close on credibility gap not income ceiling. June £1,500/wk booking is concrete proof point. Teacher mindset = consistency over hype.
